nasb.text: So many peoples and mighty nations will come to seek the Lord of hosts in Jerusalem and to entreat the favor of the Lord.’

esv.text: Many peoples and strong nations shall come to seek the Lord of hosts in Jerusalem and to entreat the favor of the Lord.

cnv.text: 必有很多的民族和強大的國家前來，在耶路撒冷求告萬軍之耶和華，懇求他施恩。’

ccb.text: 各民族和各强国必来耶路撒冷寻求万军之耶和华，向耶和华求恩。
